title: 2012 GST/HST Incremental Federal Rebate for Municipalities - Canada.ca
content:
## 2012 GST/HST Incremental Federal Rebate for Municipalities
The Goods and Services (GST) and Harmonized Sales Tax (HST) Incremental Federal Rebate for Municipalities Report - January 1 to December 31, 2012, is available for download in the following formats:
- HTML British Columbia
- HTML Newfoundland and Labrador
- HTML Northwest Territories
- HTML Prince Edward Island
- PDF All provinces and territories
- Spreadsheet (CSV) All provinces and territories
For information about HTML and PDF formats, see our help files .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
